title: GeneLab Benchmark: A Multi-Tissue Spaceflight Transcriptomics Benchmark for AI/ML Models

result_match_policy.dataset_snapshot_policy: compare only against the benchmark-pinned feature-matrix and metadata snapshot for the configured reviewer or full run

children.name: Load benchmark feature matrices
children.requirement: Load the benchmark feature matrices and associated metadata from HuggingFace, cached artifacts, or benchmark-packaged files.
children.grading_notes: The reviewer path may use processed matrices rather than raw downloads.

children.name: Attach mission and tissue labels
children.requirement: Represent mission IDs, tissue labels, and binary Flight/Ground targets in the working dataset.
children.grading_notes: The labels must be preserved for fold construction.

children.name: Implement fold-safe preprocessing
children.requirement: Implement preprocessing in a train-fold-safe manner, including any filtering, scaling, or feature selection.
children.grading_notes: Any preprocessing that leaks held-out mission information should fail later result-match leaves.

children.name: Define LOMO splits
children.requirement: Define leave-one-mission-out splits explicitly for the benchmark tasks.
children.grading_notes: The split manifest should make the held-out mission explicit.

children.name: Fit elastic-net logistic regression
children.requirement: Implement an elastic-net logistic-regression baseline.
children.grading_notes: A SAGA-style implementation is preferred.

children.name: Fit random forest
children.requirement: Implement a random-forest baseline.
children.grading_notes: The model should produce probability outputs for AUROC.

children.name: Fit XGBoost
children.requirement: Implement an XGBoost baseline or a documented equivalent boosted-tree model.
children.grading_notes: Probability outputs are required.

children.name: Fit PCA plus logistic regression
children.requirement: Implement a PCA plus logistic-regression baseline.
children.grading_notes: PCA must be fit on the training fold only.

children.name: Compute bootstrap and permutation metrics
children.requirement: Compute AUROC together with bootstrap confidence intervals and permutation-based significance.
children.grading_notes: The metric layer is part of the benchmark, not an optional add-on.

children.name: Implement cross-mission transfer
children.requirement: Implement ordered train-on-mission i, test-on-mission j transfer tasks.
children.grading_notes: The matrix semantics must be explicit.

children.name: Implement cross-tissue transfer
children.requirement: Implement at least one benchmark-consistent cross-tissue transfer workflow.
children.grading_notes: Gene-level or pathway-level transfer is acceptable if documented.

children.name: Summarize transfer matrices
children.requirement: Write transfer results as structured matrices or tidy tables.
children.grading_notes: The scorer should be able to align rows and columns to missions or tissues.

children.name: Apply Go/No-Go rules
children.requirement: Apply the benchmark's Go/No-Go criteria to the LOMO or transfer outputs.
children.grading_notes: The threshold logic must be explicit.

children.name: Stage Geneformer inputs
children.requirement: Prepare the inputs needed for a Geneformer evaluation or a documented lightweight staging run.
children.grading_notes: Serious Geneformer runs are expected on a GPU-equipped HPC; staged lightweight runs are acceptable if documented.

children.name: Run or stage Geneformer evaluation
children.requirement: Run Geneformer or stage it explicitly with documented constraints and expected outputs.
children.grading_notes: A transparent staged workflow can earn code-development credit.

children.name: Compare foundation model to classical baselines
children.requirement: Compare the foundation-model branch to the classical baselines using the same benchmark metrics.
children.grading_notes: The comparison logic is required even if the run is lightweight.

children.name: Run pathway scoring or enrichment
children.requirement: Run a pathway-level analysis such as preranked GSEA or sample-level pathway scoring.
children.grading_notes: Open-source implementations are acceptable.

children.name: Implement negative controls
children.requirement: Implement negative controls such as label permutations or housekeeping-gene baselines.
children.grading_notes: These controls are essential benchmark logic, not optional polish.

children.name: Compute feature importance
children.requirement: Compute feature-importance summaries such as SHAP values for at least one classical model.
children.grading_notes: The output should be aligned to tissue or task context.

children.name: Export analysis artifacts
children.requirement: Write pathway, control, and interpretability artifacts to disk.
children.grading_notes: Credit requires durable files, not notebook-only display.

children.name: Data loading executes
children.requirement: Load the benchmark matrices and metadata without fatal error.
children.grading_notes: Warnings are acceptable if the objects are usable.

children.name: Split manifest written
children.requirement: Write the LOMO or transfer split manifest to disk.
children.grading_notes: The scorer should be able to verify held-out missions.

children.name: Preprocessed matrix written
children.requirement: Write the preprocessed feature matrix or a cached derivative to disk.
children.grading_notes: The output should support downstream model fitting.

children.name: Classical baseline training executes
children.requirement: Execute the classical baseline training workflow without fatal error.
children.grading_notes: At least two model families should actually run.

children.name: AUROC table written
children.requirement: Write AUROC results to disk.
children.grading_notes: The table should identify tissue, mission, or transfer context.

children.name: Bootstrap confidence intervals written
children.requirement: Write bootstrap confidence intervals to disk.
children.grading_notes: The scorer should be able to inspect lower and upper bounds.

children.name: Permutation results written
children.requirement: Write permutation-based significance results to disk.
children.grading_notes: A p-value or null summary is required.

children.name: Cross-mission matrix written
children.requirement: Write a cross-mission transfer matrix or tidy equivalent to disk.
children.grading_notes: Row and column labels must be recoverable.

children.name: Cross-tissue results written
children.requirement: Write cross-tissue transfer results to disk.
children.grading_notes: A tidy table is acceptable.

children.name: Go/No-Go summary written
children.requirement: Write a Go/No-Go summary to disk.
children.grading_notes: The summary must reference the underlying metrics.

children.name: Geneformer staging executes
children.requirement: Execute the Geneformer staging or lightweight evaluation branch without fatal error.
children.grading_notes: A documented staged path is acceptable.

children.name: Foundation comparison written
children.requirement: Write the foundation-versus-classical comparison to disk.
children.grading_notes: The comparison must use benchmark metrics.

children.name: Pathway and control outputs written
children.requirement: Write pathway and negative-control outputs to disk.
children.grading_notes: Both branches must leave inspectable artifacts.

children.name: Feature-importance outputs written
children.requirement: Write feature-importance outputs to disk.
children.grading_notes: The scorer should be able to inspect top features or SHAP values.

children.name: Six tissues present
children.requirement: The benchmark dataset contains all six benchmark tissues.
children.grading_notes: Strict leaf. Missing tissues fail the leaf.

children.name: Mission count within reference band
children.requirement: The number of represented missions matches the benchmark-pinned reference exactly.
children.grading_notes: Strict leaf anchored to the benchmark metadata.

children.name: Sample count within reference band
children.requirement: The total sample count lies within 10% of the hidden reference.
children.grading_notes: This allows for small reviewer-path subsets only when the benchmark is configured that way.

children.name: No train-test leakage
children.requirement: The split manifest shows zero overlap between training and held-out mission samples for every evaluated task.
children.grading_notes: Any leakage fails the leaf regardless of downstream score.

children.name: LOMO AUROC table close to reference
children.requirement: The LOMO AUROC table reaches mean absolute error no greater than 0.05 against the hidden reference.
children.grading_notes: Compare tissue-aligned AUROC values on the benchmark-pinned reviewer or full snapshot.

children.name: Bootstrap confidence intervals close to reference
children.requirement: The bootstrap confidence intervals differ by no more than 0.05 in absolute value from the hidden reference for both lower and upper bounds.
children.grading_notes: Compare lower and upper bounds on the same evaluated tissues or transfer tasks.

children.name: Permutation p-values close to reference
children.requirement: The permutation p-values or null summaries differ by no more than 0.02 in absolute value from the hidden reference.
children.grading_notes: Numeric-first comparator leaf.

children.name: Best-baseline ranking overlap above threshold
children.requirement: The ranking of classical baselines reaches Kendall tau of at least 0.67 against the hidden-reference ordering.
children.grading_notes: The benchmark compares model ordering, not only raw scores.

children.name: Go/No-Go decisions overlap with reference
children.requirement: The benchmark Go/No-Go decisions exactly match the hidden reference across all evaluated tissues or tasks.
children.grading_notes: This captures whether the agent handled the confidence-interval logic correctly.

children.name: Tissue-level performance signal recovered
children.requirement: The relative performance pattern across tissues reaches Spearman rho of at least 0.80 against the hidden reference.
children.grading_notes: Numeric-first comparator leaf.

children.name: Cross-mission matrix similarity above threshold
children.requirement: The cross-mission transfer matrix reaches mean absolute error no greater than 0.07 against the hidden reference.
children.grading_notes: Numeric-first comparator leaf.

children.name: Cross-tissue results similarity above threshold
children.requirement: The cross-tissue transfer results reach mean absolute error no greater than 0.07 against the hidden reference.
children.grading_notes: Numeric-first comparator leaf.

children.name: Pathway-versus-gene direction recovered
children.requirement: The submission recovers the benchmark direction of a gene-level versus pathway-level comparison.
children.grading_notes: Compare the sign of the mean pathway-level AUROC advantage over the paired gene-level baseline on the benchmark-pinned hidden task.

children.name: Transfer summary overlap above threshold
children.requirement: The ranked transfer-summary conclusions reach overlap@4 of at least 0.75 against the hidden-reference top findings.
children.grading_notes: This leaf captures whether the agent preserved the narrative of which transfers work best.

children.name: Geneformer score within reference band
children.requirement: The Geneformer benchmark score lies within 0.05 AUROC of the hidden reference for the configured reviewer or full task.
children.grading_notes: The benchmark may use a staged or cached reference when reviewer-mode is enabled.

children.name: Foundation-versus-classical direction recovered
children.requirement: The submission recovers the hidden-reference direction of the foundation-versus-classical comparison.
children.grading_notes: This leaf is about the comparison sign, not only the exact score.

children.name: Foundation-model ranking overlap above threshold
children.requirement: The ranking of the foundation-model branch relative to the classical baselines reaches Kendall tau of at least 0.50 against the hidden-reference ordering.
children.grading_notes: Numeric-first comparator leaf.

children.name: Negative control near chance
children.requirement: The negative-control AUROC lies between 0.45 and 0.55.
children.grading_notes: This is a critical sanity-check leaf.

children.name: Housekeeping baseline near chance
children.requirement: The housekeeping-gene baseline AUROC lies between 0.45 and 0.55.
children.grading_notes: This guards against feature leakage and label leakage.

children.name: Pathway-enrichment overlap above threshold
children.requirement: The ranked pathway outputs reach rank-biased overlap of at least 0.60 against the hidden reference.
children.grading_notes: Numeric-first comparator leaf.

children.name: Feature-importance overlap above threshold
children.requirement: The top feature-importance outputs reach overlap@20 of at least 0.35 against the hidden reference.
children.grading_notes: Numeric-first comparator leaf.
